senses.gloss: to enrich with some ingredient or company, to associate
condiment, seasoning, side comestible, what one dips the bread into

examples.text: كَانَ لَهُ رِزْقٌ مِنْ طَعَامٍ وَأُدْمٍ مِنْ عِنْدِ تَاجِرٍ يَبِيعُ ٱلسَّمْنَ وَٱلْعَسَلَ وَكَانَ يَأْتِيهِ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ مِنَ ٱلسَّمْنِ وَالْعَسَلِ
examples.english: He had an allowance of food and condiment from a merchant who bought butter and honey and brought him butter and honey each day.
